lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: Welcome to my little chapel. Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you here?

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: I built this chapel here so that fighters could come and pray before battle. A fighter who ignores their spiritual needs may as well have stabbed themselves in the foot.

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: People keep claiming they're not interested in religion, but as soon as they're under attack they're yelling for 'Protect from Melee'. Sad, really.

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: So is there something I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So whose sister are you?

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: Ahahahahahaha, very funny! With jokes like that, you should become a banker.

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: Actually, that's a bit of a sore point. Asgarnia has a building full of monks, all living happily as a community of brothers, but they don't let women join.

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: I'd heard rumours that there was an Abbey up here somewhere, which sounded marvellous, but I seem to be in the wrong place.

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: Anyway, I've found a worthy cause here, running my little chapel, so I'm happy enough. Now, can I help you with something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: Welcome to my little chapel. Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you here?

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: I built this chapel here so that fighters could come and pray before battle. A fighter who ignores their spiritual needs may as well have stabbed themselves in the foot.

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: People keep claiming they're not interested in religion, but as soon as they're under attack they're yelling for 'Protect from Melee'. Sad, really.

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: So is there something I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So whose sister are you?

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: Ahahahahahaha, very funny! With jokes like that, you should become a banker.

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: But no I am a sister to the broken and down trodden, I heard talk of this enclave being built and knew that my skills could be put to good use.

lines.speaker: Sister Scarophia
lines.text: I've found a worthy cause here running my little chapel, so I'm happy enough. Now, can I help you with something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.
